findings.evidence: Coercive control is repeatedly buffered by procedural euphemism at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:241, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:245, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:365, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:369, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:387.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: moments that should name coercion directly are softened into routine/monitoring/schedule language, which blunts the emotional and ethical force of the control dynamic even when physical strain is shown.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the institutional framing beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:241 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:245, then the punishment beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:365, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:369, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:387 so the prose names the power dynamic in plain language and ties it to concrete social/body consequences visible on page.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:241 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:365 include at least one explicit naming of coercive control and at least two concrete consequences (institutional, social, or physical) tied to it; FAIL if the passage still relies on abstract routine/monitoring phrasing without new concrete consequence detail.

findings.problem: Mid-chapter causal momentum stalls because multiple text-message beats perform the same function (food/timing compliance check) before adding materially new leverage, making escalation feel looped instead of sharpened.
findings.rewrite_direction: Reshape the school-day escalation by condensing one redundant text cluster in the spans anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:112, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:136, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:174, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:230, and use recovered space to add a distinct consequence trigger that feeds directly into the locker rupture at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:297.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each surviving text interruption in the cited school section introduces a new leverage shift (new threat, new concealment cost, or new witness pressure) and none repeats a prior cluster's function; FAIL if two clusters still read as interchangeable compliance reminders.

findings.evidence: Teacher dialogue turns thesis-like and over-formal under scene pressure at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:76, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:80, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:249, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:267.
findings.problem: Register drift: Ms. DeMarco's key lines become polished policy statements rather than lived speech rhythm, which undercuts realism and the style-bible default toward contracted, pressure-responsive dialogue.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework Ms. DeMarco's lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:76, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:249, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:267 into more colloquial school-floor diction (contractions, interruptions, concrete classroom stakes) while preserving authority.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised teacher lines in the cited spans use spoken contractions and concrete immediate stakes (attendance, classwork, counselor referral) without abstract thesis phrasing like 'optional collateral'; FAIL if the lines still read like declarative policy copy.

findings.evidence: A mirrored oscillation sentence template recurs across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:42, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:108, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:208.
findings.problem: Recurring prose formula: repeated 'state shifts out and back' cadence (X then Y then X again) appears more than twice, which reads as autopilot rhythm rather than chosen variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep one oscillation line for motif, but recast the other two at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:42, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:108, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:208 into structurally different sentence shapes (e.g., compression in one, concrete image pivot in another).
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than one of the three cited lines retains the mirrored oscillation syntax and the other revised lines use clearly different rhythm/structure on read-through; FAIL if two or more still use the same oscillation template.

findings.evidence: The locker confrontation runs external for a long stretch with minimal interior anchoring from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:271 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:305 before interiority returns at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:307.
findings.problem: Timidity/screenplay drift: the focalizer's inner experience drops out for 10+ consecutive paragraphs in a high-stakes rupture, reducing emotional pressure exactly where it should peak.
findings.rewrite_direction: Seed interior beats into the exchange between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:271 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:305 (fear, bodily stress, grief-triggered memory, or self-assessment) so external dialogue/action does not run unmodulated.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised locker span includes at least three explicit interior beats and no run longer than six consecutive paragraphs without interior access; FAIL if the scene still plays as predominantly external transcript until line 307-equivalent.

findings.evidence: Style-bible stress tells are over-literalized as repeated logistics/checklist blocks at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:13, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:108, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:291, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:351.
findings.problem: Mechanical repetition from lexical-signature overuse: counting/timestamp/checklist expression repeats in near-identical form, flattening voice texture instead of deepening Anika's stress pattern.
findings.rewrite_direction: Diversify stress expression modes across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:108, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:291, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:351 by keeping one numeric/logistics block and rewriting the others into different manifestations (sensory distortion, avoidance behavior, or misreading-language drift).
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the three cited stress moments are no longer rendered as the same checklist/timestamp pattern and each reveals stress through a distinct textual mode; FAIL if they still read as interchangeable command-log entries.

summary: FAIL across all four lenses. The chapter lands required spine beats and preserves canonical past tense, with no clear continuity-sheet contradiction detected, but unresolved MEDIUM+ issues remain: HIGH sanitization/euphemism drift around coercive control, repeated mid-chapter leverage loops, over-formal teacher dialogue at pressure points, screenplay-like interiority loss in the locker rupture, and recurring prose/checklist formulas that flatten texture.
